title: chylismia exilis
intro: Chylismia exilis, also known as the evening primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the onagraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chylismia exilis include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with menstrual cramps, as well as supporting heart health and lowering blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Chylismia exilis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
